breakdown: This PR stabilizes XP synthesis by adding checks for xp_awarded from combat/encounter summaries with proper fallback to rewards_pending. It removes the duplicate _extract_xp_from_player_data function in favor of extract_character_xp, reducing code duplication. Good defensive type checking added (isinstance checks), but inline comments could better explain the WHY behind the precedence order changes.
key_changes: Added xp_awarded check in _synthesize_generic_rewards_box for combat rewards with type-safe isinstance check
Added xp_awarded check in _synthesize_generic_rewards_box for encounter rewards
Added comprehensive tests for extract_character_xp covering missing/invalid inputs and float conversion
